title: Chef Aid Nylon Tea Strainer, Durable 6cm Fine Mesh for Loose Leaf Tea and Herbal Infusions, BPA Free, Dishwasher Safe
features: DURABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT: Made with high-quality nylon mesh to provide a reliable and long-lasting strainer for your favourite teas, BPA FREE
FINE MESH DESIGN: Ensures a smooth and flavourful brew by capturing even the smallest tea leaves and particles
PERFECT 6CM SIZE: Compact and efficient, this 6cm tea strainer fits comfortably in most teapots, mugs, and cups
EASY TO CLEAN: Designed for quick and effortless cleaning, making it convenient for everyday use
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for loose leaf teas, herbal infusions, and even straining soups or sauces
